commit_message:
[RTL] Fix bug 227, only reset kv data present bits on mandatory zeroize [RTL] Fix bug 227, only reset kv data present bits on mandatory zeroize Closes #227 

This is a fix for Caliptra instantiation of ABR.

Keyvault data present bits protect the shared key from being read when the source data came from the keyvault. The data present bits were being reset at the end of the operation, exposing the sharedkey to the read API if the destination was not set to the keyvault.

With this fix, data
